---
title: "Group 1 Page"
_quarto:
  tests:
    html:
      ensureHtmlElements:
        -
          - 'img[class*="light-content"][src="./sun-face.png"]'
          - 'img[class*="dark-content"][src="./moon-face.png"]'
        - []
---

First sidebar with no explicit logo. Brand logo should be resolved for sidebar 1.
